title: EU VAT OSS / IOSS compliance for cross-border DTC
pain_description: OSS / IOSS registration + quarterly filings + per-country rules; brands skip EU or over-pay.
santifer_pattern: Order ingest + country rule engine + OSS filer + refund handling

title: GDPR DPO outsourcing + DPIA automation
pain_description: DPO-as-service + DPIA templates + RoPA. SaaS founders punt; enforcement catching up.
santifer_pattern: Processing-activity discovery + RoPA builder + DPIA drafter + DPO-assist agent

title: CSRD sustainability reporting for EU mid-market
pain_description: CSRD mandatory; ESRS 1000+ data points; mid-market unprepared.
santifer_pattern: Data ingest + ESRS mapper + narrative + auditor-ready pack

specific_prospects.name: CSRD Reporting Association (EU)
specific_prospects.signal_size: 2,000+ mid-market EU companies preparing for CSRD
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Regional compliance seminars. Email sustainability officers. Sponsor ESG workshops.

specific_prospects.name: r/sustainability
specific_prospects.signal_size: 95,000 members including ESG and sustainability professionals
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Post case study on CSRD data point automation. DM CFOs.

specific_prospects.name: Watershed user community
specific_prospects.signal_size: 1,200+ companies using Watershed for carbon reporting
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Pitch co-integration for CSRD. Email sustainability directors.

specific_prospects.name: Mid-market EU companies (manufacturing, retail, tech)
specific_prospects.signal_size: 500+ mid-market EU companies facing CSRD deadline 2025
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Email CFO / sustainability officer. Propose discovery call.

specific_prospects.name: EU sustainability consulting firms (KPMG, Deloitte, EY, Accenture)
specific_prospects.signal_size: 10+ large consulting firms offering CSRD services
specific_prospects.why_reachable: Email partner lead. Propose white-label integration.

velocity_signal.evidence: CSRD (Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive) becomes mandatory Jan 1 2025 for Large companies, 2026 for Listed SMEs. ESRS published October 2023 (1,000-plus data points). Google Trends: CSRD search interest up 210 percent year over year in EU. Watershed and Sweep raised $30M-plus in 2024 to serve this demand.
velocity_signal.trigger: EU regulatory deadline (Jan 2025 for Large, Jan 2026 for Listed SMEs). Board-level ESG mandates. Investor pressure (BlackRock, Vanguard voting on climate). Audit readiness panic starting Q4 2024.

buying_intent_evidence.quote: CSRD requires 1,000-plus data points across environmental, social, governance. We have no system to gather or validate them. Deadline is Jan 2025 and we are 60 percent unprepared.
Watershed is good for carbon, but CSRD demands social and governance data synthesis. We are actively looking for solutions.

kill_risks.risk: Watershed and Sweep are well-funded with European presence. Both are moving upmarket to CSRD.
kill_risks.current_status: Watershed is carbon-first. Sweep is broader but still emerging on narrative synthesis. 12-month window before both add full CSRD coverage.

kill_risks.risk: CSRD data validation and audit are strict. Errors result in regulatory fines (up to 10M euros or 2 to 5 percent revenue). Board liability.
kill_risks.current_status: LLM can draft narrative, but validation rules and human audit are non-negotiable. Reduces speed gain from 75 percent to 30 percent.

kill_risks.risk: ESRS standards are evolving. EU may issue guidance updates in 2025 that shift data requirements.
kill_risks.current_status: Core 1,000 data points are stable. Minor updates expected but major overhaul unlikely.

fermi_math_to_50k.notes: About 1,500 mid-market EU companies (100M to 1B euros) facing CSRD deadline. Conversion 10 percent from companies in panic mode (deadline Jan 2025). Anchor $3K to $4.5K per month per company. 14 customers at $3,500 per month = $49,000. Timeline: 3 to 5 customers per month starting month 3, inflection at month 6 to 8, plateau at month 12 post-deadline.
